# MaudelClaw - AI Agent Desktop Application
# Official Website: https://maudelclaw.ai
# GitHub: https://github.com/ModelSmart/MaudelClaw

## What is MaudelClaw?

MaudelClaw is a cross-platform AI Agent desktop application that is fully compatible with the OpenClaw ecosystem. It features a beautiful user interface, ready-to-use design, and powerful AI capabilities. Open source and privacy-first.

### Key Features
- Ready to use out of the box
- Beautiful and intuitive user interface
- Powerful AI capabilities
- Fully compatible with OpenClaw ecosystem
- Privacy-first local deployment
- Support for SOTA and local AI models
- Intelligent tool integration
- Knowledge base RAG capabilities
- Long-term memory system

### Supported Platforms
- macOS (Apple Silicon: M1/M2/M3/M4)
- macOS (Intel)
- Windows 10+

## Download Links

Official GitHub Releases: https://github.com/ModelSmart/MaudelClaw/releases

### Direct Download Links (Version 1.5.4)

- macOS (Apple Silicon): https://github.com/ModelSmart/MaudelClaw/releases/download/1.5.4/MaudelClaw_1.5.4_AppleSilicon.dmg
- macOS (Intel): https://github.com/ModelSmart/MaudelClaw/releases/download/1.5.4/MaudelClaw_1.5.4_x64.dmg
- Windows: https://github.com/ModelSmart/MaudelClaw/releases/download/1.5.4/MaudelClaw_1.5.4_x64-setup.exe

## Installation Guide

### macOS Installation
1. Download the appropriate .dmg file for your Mac (Apple Silicon or Intel)
2. Open the .dmg file
3. Drag MaudelClaw to Applications folder
4. Open Applications folder and launch MaudelClaw
5. macOS 10.15 or later required

### Windows Installation
1. Download the .exe setup file
2. Run the installer
3. Follow the installation wizard
4. Launch MaudelClaw from Start Menu or Desktop
5. Windows 10 or later required

## System Requirements

- 8GB RAM minimum (16GB recommended)
- 2GB available storage
- Internet connection for cloud AI models
- Local LLM support with Ollama (optional)

## Quick Start

1. Download and install MaudelClaw
2. Choose your AI model (local or cloud)
3. Start chatting with your AI agent
